form.title: Let's Talk Security
form.subtitle: Fill out the form and our expert team will contact you shortly.
form.legal_nda: Your data will be treated with strict confidentiality under NDA (Non-Disclosure Agreement).
form.success_desc: We will analyze your request and respond via encrypted channel.

about.title: Who We Are
about.subtitle: Meet the people behind the initiative.

students.title: UCN Students
students.description: We are IT Engineering students at Universidad Católica del Norte (UCN), specializing in Cybersecurity and currently in our final academic year.

experience.title: Experience & Efficiency
experience.description: Thanks to our academic journey, we possess strong project management skills, prioritizing client needs and applying agile methodologies.

support.title: Constant Support
support.description: Our vision doesn't end with project delivery. We provide ongoing support and assistance to ensure a seal of quality.

hero.title: We Audit the Invisible. We Protect the Essential.
hero.subtitle: Specialized consulting in Pentesting, Red Teaming, and Compliance.

ucn.label: Academic Collaboration
ucn.title: UCN Cybersecurity Academy
ucn.subtitle: We collaborate with the Cybersecurity Academy of Universidad Católica del Norte (UCN), lending them our domain so they can operate and grow. We support their mission to train the next generation of cybersecurity professionals in the Coquimbo region.

services.title: Operational Capabilities
services.subtitle: Specialized technical services with transparent pricing and international standards.
services.disclaimer: * Prices listed are minimum estimated references. Final value varies based on project complexity and scope. Contact us for a personalized quote.

development.title: Software Development
development.description: Design and development of web applications, APIs, and custom software with security built in from the start (DevSecOps).

consulting.title: Audits & Advisory
consulting.description: Vulnerability analysis, security audits, and compliance advisory to protect your organization's most critical assets.

redteam.title: Cybersecurity — Red Teaming
redteam.description: We simulate real attacks against your organization to identify security gaps before malicious actors do. Ethical Hacking with certified methodologies.

tutoring.title: Tutoring & Training
tutoring.description: Training in cybersecurity, programming, and technology. Personalized education for teams, companies, or students looking to strengthen their technical skills.
